objects.name: cap_citations_ranked

columns.data_type: STRUCT(rank BIGINT, cite_type VARCHAR, normalized_cite VARCHAR, cap_id BIGINT, cap_name VARCHAR, pagerank_percentile DOUBLE, occurrences BIGINT, resolved BOOLEAN)[]

objects.create_sql: CREATE VIEW cap_citations_ranked AS SELECT * FROM read_json_auto('C:/DEVPROJECTS/legal-10/legal-10/datasets/cap_citations_ranked.jsonl');

objects.name: cap_citations_ranked_flat
objects.create_sql: CREATE VIEW cap_citations_ranked_flat AS SELECT r.anchor_caseId, r.anchor_usCite, c.rank AS rank, c.cite_type, c.normalized_cite, c.cap_id, c.cap_name, c.pagerank_percentile, c.occurrences, c.resolved FROM cap_citations_ranked AS r , unnest(r.citations) AS t(c);
objects.body_sql_rewritten: SELECT r.anchor_caseId, r.anchor_usCite, c.rank AS rank, c.cite_type, c.normalized_cite, c.cap_id, c.cap_name, c.pagerank_percentile, c.occurrences, c.resolved FROM cap_citations_ranked AS r , unnest(r.citations) AS t(c)

objects.name: scdb_with_fowler
objects.create_sql: CREATE VIEW scdb_with_fowler AS SELECT s.*, ((f.auth_score IS NOT NULL) OR (f.pauth_score IS NOT NULL)) AS has_fowler_score, f.auth_score AS fowler_auth_score, f.pauth_score AS fowler_pauth_score, f.snapshot_year AS fowler_snapshot_year FROM scdb_cases AS s LEFT JOIN fowler_scores AS f ON ((s.lexisCite = f.lexis_cite));
objects.body_sql_rewritten: SELECT s.*, ((f.auth_score IS NOT NULL) OR (f.pauth_score IS NOT NULL)) AS has_fowler_score, f.auth_score AS fowler_auth_score, f.pauth_score AS fowler_pauth_score, f.snapshot_year AS fowler_snapshot_year FROM scdb_cases AS s LEFT JOIN fowler_scores AS f ON ((s.lexisCite = f.lexis_cite))

objects.name: scdb_with_ideology
objects.create_sql: CREATE VIEW scdb_with_ideology AS SELECT s.caseId, s.caseName, s.term, s.majOpinWriter, m.justice_name AS author_name, m.post_mn AS author_ideology, m.post_sd AS ideology_uncertainty, s.decisionDirection, s.partyWinning, s.issueArea FROM scdb_cases AS s LEFT JOIN martin_quinn_scores AS m ON (((CAST(s.majOpinWriter AS INTEGER) = m.scdb_justice_id) AND (CAST(s.term AS INTEGER) = m.term))) WHERE (s.majOpinWriter IS NOT NULL);
objects.body_sql_rewritten: SELECT s.caseId, s.caseName, s.term, s.majOpinWriter, m.justice_name AS author_name, m.post_mn AS author_ideology, m.post_sd AS ideology_uncertainty, s.decisionDirection, s.partyWinning, s.issueArea FROM scdb_cases AS s LEFT JOIN martin_quinn_scores AS m ON (((CAST(s.majOpinWriter AS INTEGER) = m.scdb_justice_id) AND (CAST(s.term AS INTEGER) = m.term))) WHERE (s.majOpinWriter IS NOT NULL)

objects.name: scotus_citations_ranked

columns.data_type: STRUCT(rank BIGINT, normalized_cite VARCHAR, cited_caseId VARCHAR, cited_usCite VARCHAR, cited_caseName VARCHAR, fowler_score DOUBLE, occurrences BIGINT, resolved BOOLEAN)[]

objects.create_sql: CREATE VIEW scotus_citations_ranked AS SELECT * FROM read_json_auto('C:/DEVPROJECTS/legal-10/legal-10/datasets/scotus_citations_ranked.jsonl');

objects.name: scotus_citations_ranked_flat
objects.create_sql: CREATE VIEW scotus_citations_ranked_flat AS SELECT r.anchor_caseId, r.anchor_usCite, c.rank AS rank, c.normalized_cite, c.cited_caseId, c.cited_usCite, c.cited_caseName, c.fowler_score, c.occurrences, c.resolved FROM scotus_citations_ranked AS r , unnest(r.citations) AS t(c);
objects.body_sql_rewritten: SELECT r.anchor_caseId, r.anchor_usCite, c.rank AS rank, c.normalized_cite, c.cited_caseId, c.cited_usCite, c.cited_caseName, c.fowler_score, c.occurrences, c.resolved FROM scotus_citations_ranked AS r , unnest(r.citations) AS t(c)

objects.name: songer_cap_matches
objects.create_sql: CREATE VIEW songer_cap_matches AS SELECT s.*, c.cap_source, c.cap_id AS cap_id, c.decision_year AS cap_decision_year, c.court_slug AS cap_court_slug FROM songer_cases AS s INNER JOIN cap_cases_meta AS c ON (((s.cite_key IS NOT NULL) AND (s.cite_key = c.cite_key)));
objects.body_sql_rewritten: SELECT s.*, c.cap_source, c.cap_id AS cap_id, c.decision_year AS cap_decision_year, c.court_slug AS cap_court_slug FROM songer_cases AS s INNER JOIN cap_cases_meta AS c ON (((s.cite_key IS NOT NULL) AND (s.cite_key = c.cite_key)))
